C1_tieredValue_coverage.notes: 13/15 minigames fully use tieredValue(). mg_regard only scales showTime (1 param — only time-based param needed). mg_herboristerie only scales totalTime (1 param — grid layout is static). mg_negociation.maxWords=30 hardcoded (on-screen cap, not a difficulty axis — acceptable). All critical numeric difficulty params correctly covered. Strong overall.

C2_checkCriticalAlert_usage.notes: 9/10 timer-based minigames correctly call checkCriticalAlert() in setInterval. MISSING in mg_equilibre (timer at lines 116-128 — no checkCriticalAlert call). mg_regard/mg_echo/mg_course have no setInterval timer (pure frame-based or round-based) — N/A. mg_equilibre is the only timer-based minigame missing this call: critical_alert SFX will never fire for equilibre.

C3_cleanup_endGame_listeners.notes: CRITICAL: mg_herboristerie line 308 calls setTimeout(() => this.endGame(), 300) inside pickCellByIdx(). Handle not stored — cleanup() cannot cancel it. If player exits within 300ms of completing all targets, orphaned setTimeout fires endGame() on destroyed instance. finish() idempotent guard (MinigameBase.finished) blocks double-resolve, but DOM queries inside endGame() run on empty container. Contrast with mg_fouille (foundTimeout stored+cancelled correctly). All other minigames: cleanup() correctly mirrors all listeners added in setup(). mg_equilibre correctly removes document-level keydown/keyup in both endGame() and cleanup().

C4_aria_live_status_elements.notes: SYSTEMATIC: Only mg_echo has aria-live on its status element (C49 fix). 14/15 minigames with dynamic status/score elements are missing aria-live='polite'. Affected: mg_apaisement (#mg-apaise-score), mg_combat_rituel (#mg-combat-status), mg_course (#mg-course-status), mg_fouille (#mg-fouille-status), mg_negociation (#mg-nego-sequence), mg_ombres (#mg-ombres-status), mg_regard (#mg-regard-status), mg_sang_froid (#mg-sf-status), mg_volonte (#mg-volonte-status), mg_equilibre (no DOM status), mg_runes (no DOM status), mg_traces (no DOM status). WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.3 violation across 14 minigames.

C5_canvas_tabIndex.notes: All 15 minigames set canvas.tabIndex = 0. Perfect coverage.

C6_stale_rAF_cancel.notes: All minigames call cancelAnimationFrame in both endGame() and cleanup(). mg_regard and mg_echo: endGame() sets phase='done', render() guard exits early before rAF self-reschedules, then cleanup() cancels — functionally safe, one extra rAF callback fires before guard triggers. Not a stale-rAF bug but unorthodox. -1 point.

C7_score_calculation.notes: MEDIUM: mg_herboristerie penalty scale (8pts per wrong pick) can suppress score unfairly for exploratory players with many misclicks even when all targets are found. Math.max(0,...) prevents underflow but reussite tier (51-85) is hard to reach with any wrong picks at high tier (21-24 decoys in a dense grid). All other score formulas produce correct 0-100 output with Math.min/max guards.

C8_sfx_dispatch_names.notes: MEDIUM: mg_traces line 120 dispatches sound='ogham_unlock' on sequence completion — all other 14 minigames use 'unlock'. If the SFX handler does not map 'ogham_unlock', this fires silently. No innerHTML with user data found — XSS clean throughout all 16 files.

top3_bugs.description: Orphaned setTimeout handle in pickCellByIdx(): setTimeout(() => this.endGame(), 300) is not assigned to a stored field. cleanup() cannot cancel it. If the player exits within 300ms of completing all targets, the orphaned callback fires endGame() on an already-destroyed instance (container.innerHTML='' has been called). finish() idempotent guard blocks double-resolve but DOM queries inside endGame() run on empty container. Pattern already solved correctly in mg_fouille (foundTimeout stored+cancelled).
top3_bugs.fix: Add private endTimeout = 0; field. Assign: this.endTimeout = window.setTimeout(() => this.endGame(), 300); Cancel in endGame() and cleanup(): clearTimeout(this.endTimeout);

top3_bugs.description: checkCriticalAlert() never called in the setInterval timer. Every other timer-based minigame calls this.checkCriticalAlert(this.timeLeft) after decrementing timeLeft. mg_equilibre is the sole exception — the 3-second critical_alert SFX will never fire during this minigame regardless of difficultyTier.
top3_bugs.fix: Add this.checkCriticalAlert(this.timeLeft); after this.timeLeft -= 0.1; in the setInterval callback.

top3_bugs.description: SFX event name mismatch on sequence completion: dispatches sound='ogham_unlock' instead of 'unlock'. All 14 other minigames use 'unlock' for success events. If the SFX dispatcher only handles the documented set ('unlock', 'lose', 'critical_alert'), the completion sound is silently dropped — no audio feedback when the player finishes the full footprint sequence.
top3_bugs.fix: Change 'ogham_unlock' to 'unlock' unless the SFX system explicitly maps 'ogham_unlock' to a distinct registered sound. Verify in the SFX handler.

MinigameBase.checkCriticalAlert: PASS — base method defined, criticalAlerted reset in play()
MinigameBase.aria_live: PASS — outcome overlay uses role=status aria-live=assertive
MinigameBase.sfx: PASS — WebAudio singleton, not merlin_sfx events

mg_apaisement.tieredValue: PASS — 4 params: totalTime, breathCycleDuration, targetWindow, goodWindow

mg_equilibre.cleanup: PASS — document keydown/keyup + canvas pointer* all removed correctly
mg_equilibre.aria_live: FAIL — no DOM status element with aria-live

mg_fouille.cleanup: PASS — foundTimeout stored+cancelled, both listeners removed

mg_herboristerie.cleanup: FAIL — orphaned setTimeout in pickCellByIdx() not stored (BUG #1)
mg_herboristerie.aria_live: FAIL — no DOM status with aria-live
mg_herboristerie.score_calc: MEDIUM — 8pt/wrongPick penalty can suppress reussite tier unfairly
mg_herboristerie.notes: keydown listener correctly removed in cleanup()

mg_runes.aria_live: FAIL — no DOM status element with aria-live
mg_runes.notes: Tile state mutation via type cast is intentional local mutation — functionally correct

mg_sang_froid.tieredValue: PASS — totalTime, endRadius, driftSpeed all 3 params
mg_sang_froid.cleanup: PASS — all 3 listeners removed in endGame+cleanup

mg_traces.aria_live: FAIL — no DOM status element with aria-live
mg_traces.sfx: FAIL — sequence completion uses sound='ogham_unlock' not 'unlock' (BUG #3)

mg_volonte.tieredValue: PASS — totalTime, targetRadius, spawnInterval, maxDistractors (4 params)
mg_volonte.cleanup: PASS — both listeners removed in endGame+cleanup

MinigameRegistry.notes: LOW: Header comment says '14 minigames' but 15 are registered (apaisement added post-comment). All 15 minigames reachable via createMinigameById(). No functional bug.

systematic_issues.recommendation: Add aria-live='polite' to all dynamic status/score DOM elements. C49 fixed mg_echo — apply same pattern to all others. WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.3.
Update comment from '14 minigames' to '15 minigames'.

xss_audit.notes: No innerHTML assignments with interpolated user/game data found across all 16 files. All dynamic text uses textContent= or Canvas fillText(). XSS surface is zero.

balance_recommendations.rationale: 8pts/wrong pick is too punishing at tier 3 (24 decoys in dense grid). Reduces to 5 keeps penalty meaningful without blocking reussite tier for players with 1-2 misclicks.
